content: At what time is ACD today?

author: potuz
content: Oh am I crazy I thought people had agreed to move it to Australia time

author: parithosh
content:
Note that ACDC #180 (11th June) will occur at 11AM UTC. This is a trial of a new time slot to accomodate the larger number of APAC CL contributors. This trial would just be for ACDC #180, ACDC #181 will continue at the existing time slot unless a more permanent change is made. 

(ping your local aussie dev to bring their A game, <@&1417820113981145228> )

author: jih2nn
content:
I joined late and missed the discussion on max deposits. I'd like to share my analysis on [Maximum New Validator Deposits per Transaction, Block and Inclusion List](https://hackmd.io/@jihoonsong/SJWAnFakMg).
The exact number may vary depending on the strategies and what ships in Glamsterdam, but it should be sufficient to give a sense of the max number of deposits possible per gas limit in the worst case.
